params._treasury: The treasury address that receives all credit purchases

params._minimumPurchase: The initial minimum purchase amount (in USDC's 6-decimal base units)
params.initialOwner: The owner address for the contract

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

purchaseCredits(uint256).details: Caller must have approved this contract to spend at least `amount` USDC

params.amount: The amount of USDC to spend (in 6-decimal base units)

purchaseCreditsFor(uint256,address).details: Caller must have approved this contract to spend at least `amount` USDCEnables operators to fund agent accounts before the agent is deployed

params.account: The address to credit the purchase to
params.amount: The amount of USDC to spend (in 6-decimal base units)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setMinimumPurchaseFor(uint256).details: Caller must be the contract owner

params.newMinimum: The new minimum purchase amount (in USDC's 6-decimal base units)

sweep(address).details: Transfers the contract's full balance of the token to the treasuryCaller must be the contract owner

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

minimumPurchase().notice: The minimum purchase amount (in USDC's 6-decimal base units)

purchaseCreditsFor(uint256,address).notice: Purchases USDC credits on behalf of any address

sweep(address).notice: Recovers tokens accidentally sent directly to the contract

treasury().notice: The treasury address that receives all credit purchases
